title: selliguea pseudoacrostichum
intro: Selliguea pseudoacrostichum, also known as the Selaginella or Spikemoss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits associated with Selliguea pseudoacrostichum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often dried, powdered, and used as a tea or incorporated into ointments and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
